message:
fix: suppress backend-unavailable GA4 errors on console.kubestellar.io (#5278)

The Go backend is not deployed on Netlify (console.kubestellar.io),
so BackendUnavailableError is expected there. These accounted for
22/30 ksc_error events today — noise that masks real issues.

Also moves useRef in GitOps.tsx to top of component with other hooks
(was placed after business logic, which can confuse React's hook
ordering in edge cases).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
